title: Andy´s Modpack
description: A relaxed modpack based on Create and some furniture mods
body:
# **Andy´s Modpack**
A nice modpack that is challenging but also relaxing. In combination with the popular Mod Create and some interior mods, it is perfect for anyone who wants to get more out of their world.

The modpack has some mods from Create and, with a variety of furniture mods, allows you to develop your own imagination on a large scale. For extra kick there are Mutated Monsters and some other changes to the game mechanics. But I don't want to reveal much more; it's best to see it for yourself.
